title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. melanomallum
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. melanomallum, also known as the black hawkweed or yellow hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Hieracium nigrescens subsp. melanomallum is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used as a natural remedy for colds, sore throats, and other minor ailments.
